Session Description w/ (Audience):: A social session geared towards REDCap administrators attending REDCapCon for the first time. The purpose of this gathering will be to welcome new attendees and help them get acquainted with others before the conference starts. Like an orientation, but more fun!  *Session registration required. (New Administrator Focused)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: Learn how to install a local REDCap instance! This is also useful if you will be attending any coding or EM sessions later on as well.   Note: If you're using a work computer, you will want to have admin rights, including access to terminal or the command line depending on what OS you're using.  (Other / Both Tech and Admin)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: Take a stroll through the posters to discover the incredible ways our administrators are leveraging REDCap at their institutions (and beyond)! Each poster highlights unique projects, creative solutions, and impactful outcomes that showcase the power of REDCap in action.  Don't forget to visit the committee tables too! Learn about the important work our committees are doing to advance REDCap initiatives and find out how you can contribute to our collaborative community.  (All Attendees)

Session Title:: Collaborative Spaces: "Birds of a Feather" Small Groups and Workshops
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Looking to connect with others who share your interests? Join us for our "Birds of a Feather" session-an open, participant-driven space where you can either start your own meet-up or join an existing one!  Whether you're diving into a specific REDCap topic or just want to network with like-minded peers, this is your chance to create meaningful conversations. Follow the link below to propose a session or browse the list of current meet-ups and find one that sparks your interest!  https://redcap.link/birdsofafeather26 (All Attendees)
